_worked_example: ADVERSARIAL — cyrillic-in-output. A Latin-only critical field whose only available value still contains Cyrillic must be BLOCKED, not finalized. SYNTHETIC only.

_mock_ocr_output.note: the user-corrected value for a Latin-only critical field still contains a Cyrillic character.

fields.issuing_authority: Вінницький РАЦС (cyrillic left in a Latin-only field)

_expected_behavior: confirmedValueGuard must fire → finalValue stays null, the route returns 422. expected=null here (must not finalize); a non-null finalization with Cyrillic in it = the guard failed and the verdict catches it as critical_wrong.
